# Contributors

Thank you to all the people who have contributed to SynAI! 🎉

## How to become a contributor

1. Fork the repository
2. Make meaningful contributions (code, docs, bug reports, etc.)
3. Submit pull requests following our guidelines
4. Get your changes merged

## Recognition

Contributors are recognized in multiple ways:

### In the codebase
- Your name will be added to this file
- Git history preserves all contributions
- Major contributors may be mentioned in release notes

### Types of contributions we value

- 🐛 Bug fixes and issue resolution
- ✨ New features and enhancements  
- 📚 Documentation improvements
- 🎨 UI/UX improvements
- 🧪 Tests and quality improvements
- 💡 Ideas and feature suggestions
- 🐛 Bug reports with clear reproduction steps

## Core Contributors

### Creator & Maintainer
- [Sashank Bhamidi](https://github.com/SashankBhamidi) - Project creator and primary maintainer
